retrieved_result: User Authentication on the Solaris OS Part 3: PAM Conversation Functions \"User Authentication on the Solaris OS Part 3: PAM Conversation Functions By Rich Teer, September 2007Learn to use the conversation functions of the PAM (Pluggable Authentication Modules) API and examine a sample program. Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses PAM API usage and Solaris OS authentication, not about debugging API integrations; it is not aligned with the query about debugging API integration.
